message:
test: add verification test suites for builder, fs, gRPC, service, and net

Introduce four new verification test files and extend the existing
network verification suite:

- tests/builder_verification.rs (724 lines): validates RuntimeBuilder
  fluent API, configuration merging, default values, and error paths
  for invalid combinations
- tests/fs_verification.rs (1252 lines): exercises the filesystem
  layer including async read/write, directory operations, rename
  atomicity, symlink handling, and error propagation for permission
  and not-found cases
- tests/grpc_verification.rs (1416 lines): end-to-end gRPC transport
  tests covering connection lifecycle, streaming, backpressure,
  deadline propagation, and metadata handling
- tests/service_verification.rs (946 lines): service-layer integration
  tests verifying request routing, middleware chains, health checks,
  and graceful shutdown behavior
- tests/net_verification.rs: fix import ordering (rustfmt), add
  dummy connection to unblock accept thread in TCP socket test,
  and reformat multi-line expressions for consistency

All tests use real implementations (no mocks) per project convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
